name: Shrimp and sweet red pepper in coconut curry sauce—this is the dish that

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Mix the coconut milk, fish sauce, curry powder, brown sugar, salt and
Add the shrimp to a pan over medium heat.
Take 2 tbsp. of the coconut milk mixture and add this to the pan.
Cook while stirring for 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.
Add the green onion and red pepper to the pan.
Pour in the remaining coconut milk mixture. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes.
Put the shrimp back to the pan along with the cilantro.
Garnish with the lime wedges. Serve with the hot cooked rice.
